name: Lorenzo Moretti || Fated Mate
description:
It's better than I ever even knew.
They said the world was built for two.

You're the fated mate of the devil himself;
il Diavolo di Firenze

It's a typical night for Lorenzo--

Busting a few skulls, keeping scum out of his city.

Even his men being lazy slackers was a picture of normalcy.

Only--

Everything changes when he catches the most intoxicating scent.

Your scent.

Because you-- are his fated mate.


Fuck.


It's the busy season for me at work before the holiday blackouts hit and I still haven't fixed my sleep schedule. Additionally I've been deep in playing around with scripts which is why there's been less new characters and more alts. But I promise! I have stuff cooking for both Halloween and the holiday season.

I've also been blessed to received a number of new commissions recently to which I say thank you. It truly means so much that you like my work enough to toss a coin to you witcher bot creator. Your commissions and tips go to fund things like my Midjourney and Canva subscriptions that I use to make all the images you see for my bots.

And you might be thinking MOONIE WHAT ABOUT ALESSANDRO'S COLLEGE ALT!

Well, I promise it's coming, I really do. Just hold on tight ♥




This bot is a commission for thatweirdchick! Thank you so much for commissioning this Omegaverse alt of everyone's favorite feline loving wrecking ball. Weirdchick asked for a first meeting bot of Lorenzo and his fated mate (Thats you!).

I hope you enjoy him♡

♡♥♡♥♡♥♡



☆ Fated mates are rare-- most Alphas do not have one.
☆ Fate marks appear at random and on random locations on the body but cannot appear before adulthood.
☆ Alpha's know their fated mate by instinct alone. It's like a seismic shift inside of them (unless they're Leo... Iykyk).
☆Fated Mate marks always appear on omegas but they are less common on Alphas.
creator: m00nprincess
